channel.title: Prebuilt Configs on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Prebuilt Configs on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: SQLite
item.description:
SQLite

  • --prebuilt value: sqlite
  • Environment Variables:
    • SQLITE_DATABASE: The path to the SQLite database file (e.g., ./sample.db).
  • Permissions:
    • File system read/write permissions for the specified database file.
  • Tools:
    • execute_sql: Executes a SQL query.
    • list_tables: Lists tables in the database.
